cases.prompt: Deploy Defender for Identity across our domain controllers, AD CS, AD FS, and Entra Connect.

expect.label: deploy sensors on every DC plus AD CS, AD FS, Entra Connect
use a gMSA for the Directory Service Account
AD CS sensor catches ESC1-ESC8 abuse paths
deploy in waves to baseline before tuning

cases.prompt: Which Defender for Identity detections cover Kerberoasting, DCSync, and Golden Ticket?

expect.label: deploy honeytoken accounts for high-confidence reconnaissance signal

cases.prompt: Which identity posture issues should I fix first in MDI?

expect.label: work the Identity Security Posture Assessments
legacy protocols and unsecure account attributes are the highest-impact fixes
posture issues are pre-attack signals - fix them before they enable an incident
